title: Hotline Bling
meaning_summary: Hotline Bling keeps earning because its hook, video memory, and crossover pop-rap simplicity make it one of Drake's most recognizable mid-2010s catalog records.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming remains the main long-tail driver for recognizable Drake singles.
Video-era cultural recall helps the song stay active beyond ordinary album-track behavior.
Views-era catalog listening connects the song to Drake's broader streaming ecosystem.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models streaming durability, video-driven cultural memory, superstar-era master participation, and songwriter/publisher splits.

ownership.master_owner: Label-distributed master with significant artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across Drake, producers, and publisher administration
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog-sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a public royalty statement.
